zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Towneley於1473年7月31日出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾堂勒 霍爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Towneley26歲，母親Julianna de Southworth24歲。他於1490年8月2日與Isabel Pilkington在英國藍卡爾華拉利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1532年在英國藍卡爾被列為high sheriff。他去世於1554年1月10日在英國藍卡爾波利享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Towneley于1473年7月31日出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾堂勒 霍爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard Towneley26岁，母亲Julianna de Southworth24岁。他于1490年8月2日与Isabel Pilkington在英国藍卡爾華拉利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1532年在英国藍卡爾被列为high sheriff。他去世于1554年1月10日在英国藍卡爾波利享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾波利。

nameMeanings.name: Towneley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Townley
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Towneley near Burnley in Lancashire, which is named with Middle English toun(e), ton(e) ‘town, village, settlement’ (Old English tūn) + leie ‘glade, clearing’. The surname has also been established in Ireland since the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘light; beauty; prosperity’, also ‘rank, power, royal majesty’, a byname of the goddesses Lakshmi and Saraswati. Also widely used as an honorific title.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Towneley was born on 31 July 1473, in Towneley Hall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Towneley, was 26 and his mother, Julianna de Southworth, was 24. He married Isabel Pilkington on 2 August 1490, in Whalley, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. In 1532, at the age of 59, his occupation is listed as high sheriff in Lancashire, England. He died on 10 January 1554, in Burnley, Lancashire, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in Burnley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Towneley est né le 31 juillet 1473, à Towneley Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Towneley, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Julianna de Southworth, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Pilkington le 2 août 1490, à Whalley, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. En 1532, à l’âge de 59 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff à Lancashire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 10 janvier 1554, à Burnley, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Burnley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Towneley am 31. Juli 1473 in Towneley Hall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Towneley 26 und seine Mutter Julianna de Southworth 24. Er hat am 2. August 1490 in Whalley, Lancashire, England Isabel Pilkington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1532, als er 59 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff in Lancashire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 10. Januar 1554 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Burnley, Lancashire, England und wurde in Burnley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Towneley è nato il il 31 luglio 1473 nel Towneley Hall, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Towneley, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Julianna de Southworth, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Pilkington il 2 agosto 1490, nel Whalley, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1532, all'età di 59 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff nel Lancashire, England. Morì il 10 gennaio 1554, nel Burnley, Lancashire, England, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Burnley, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Towneleyが1473年7月31日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアトウニリー ハルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Towneleyは26歳，母Julianna de Southworthは24歳であった。1490年8月2日にイギリスランカシュアイアウアリーでIsabel Pilkingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1532年，59歳の時，イギリスランカシュアイアでの職業はhigh sheriffと記録されている。彼は1554年1月10日にイギリスランカシュアイアブルンリーで80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアブルンリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Towneley(이)가 1473년 7월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 타운리 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Towneley(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Julianna de Southworth(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1490년 8월 2일 영국 랭카실르 화알리에서 Isabel Pilkington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1532년, 59세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 랭카실르에서 high sheriff이었다. 그는 1554년 1월 10일 영국 랭카실르 번리에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 번리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Towneley nasceu em 31 de julho de 1473, em Towneley Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Towneley, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Julianna de Southworth, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Pilkington em 2 de agosto de 1490, em Whalley, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1532, com 59 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1554, em Burnley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Burnley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Towneley родился 31 июля 1473 г. в местности тоунели холл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Towneley было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Julianna de Southworth, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Pilkington 2 августа 1490 г. в местности уолли, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1532 году, в возрасте 59 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff в местности ланкашир, Англия. Он умер 10 января 1554 г. в местности бурнли, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности бурнли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Towneley nació el 31 de julio de 1473, en Towneley Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Towneley, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Julianna de Southworth, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Isabel Pilkington el 2 de agosto de 1490, en Whalley, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1532, a la edad de 59 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Murió el 10 de enero de 1554, en Burnley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Burnley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
